key.name: default-rows
key.summary: Default rows for monitors without a custom setting

key.name: default-cols
key.summary: Default columns for monitors without a custom setting

key.name: gap
key.summary: Space between cells and around edges, in logical pixels

key.name: ui-language
key.description: Language used by the preferences window and extension UI. Use “system” to follow the GNOME/system language.

key.name: enable-drag-zones
key.summary: Snap windows to the grid while dragging

key.name: edge-threshold
key.summary: Edge zone thickness while dragging, in pixels

key.name: did-disable-edge-tiling
key.summary: Internal sentinel: the extension disabled native edge tiling
key.description: Used to safely restore org.gnome.mutter edge-tiling even after a crash.

key.name: move-up
key.summary: Move the window one cell up (at the top: maximize)

key.name: move-left
key.summary: Move the window one cell left (optional; the default comes from native Super+Left)

key.name: move-right
key.summary: Move the window one cell right (optional; the default comes from native Super+Right)

key.name: move-down
key.summary: Move the window one cell down (optional; the default comes from native Super+Down)

key.name: span-left
key.summary: Expand the window one cell left (at the edge: shrink from the right)

key.name: span-right
key.summary: Expand the window one cell right (at the edge: shrink from the left)

key.name: span-up
key.summary: Expand the window one cell up (at the edge: shrink from the bottom)

key.name: span-down
key.summary: Expand the window one cell down (at the edge: shrink from the top)

key.name: organize-monitor
key.summary: Automatically organize all movable windows on the focused monitor
